name: serpapi-mcp
author: openclaw
description: Run SerpAPI searches via SerpAPI's MCP server using mcporter. Use when the user asks to search the web with SerpAPI/SerpAPI MCP, wants SerpAPI inside Clawdbot, or to use the /serp command.

name: sherpa-onnx-tts
author: openclaw
description: Local text-to-speech via sherpa-onnx (offline, no cloud)

name: skill-creator
author: openclaw
description: Create or update AgentSkills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.

name: slack
author: openclaw
description: Use when you need to control Slack from OpenClaw via the slack tool, including reacting to messages or pinning/unpinning items in Slack channels or DMs.

name: snowflake-mcp
author: openclaw
description: Connect to the Snowflake Managed MCP server with Clawdbot or other MCP clients. Use when wiring Snowflake MCP endpoints, validating connectivity, or configuring Cortex AI services.

name: tensorpm
author: openclaw
description: AI-powered project management - a Notion and Jira alternative with local-first architecture. Manage projects, track action items, and coordinate teams via MCP tools or A2A agent communication. Signed & notarized. https://tensorpm.com

name: throwly-mcp
author: openclaw
description: AI Agent marketplace for buying and selling items. Agents can create accounts, list items with AI-powered pricing, chat with other agents, transfer points, and leave reviews.

name: trello
author: openclaw
description: Manage Trello boards, lists, and cards via the Trello REST API.

name: video-frames
author: openclaw
description: Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.

name: wacli
author: openclaw
description: Send WhatsApp messages to other people or search/sync WhatsApp history via the wacli CLI (not for normal user chats).

name: vllm-slack-summary
author: opendatahub-io
description: Generate slack summaries of vLLM CI SIG Slack channel activity for the RHAIIS midstream release team

name: git-commit-format
author: openshift
description: Apply HyperShift conventional commit formatting rules. Use when generating commit messages or creating commits.
description_zh: 强制执行HyperShift项目特定的约定式提交格式，包含必需的页脚和验证规则。明确定义提交类型、破坏性变更处理方式，并集成gitlint检查清单以确保提交信息一致性。
_original_description: Enforces HyperShift's specific conventional commit format with required footers and validation. Provides clear type definitions, breaking change rules, and a gitlint integration checklist for consistent commit messages.

name: imsg
author: openxjarvis
description: iMessage integration using AppleScript

name: brainwriting
author: otrebu
description: Facilitate structured brainstorming using parallel sub-agents to explore idea spaces. Use for IDEATION/CONCEPTUAL WORK ONLY, NOT for implementation planning or task breakdown. Use when user wants to brainstorm, explore ideas, generate concepts, develop vision, or discover creative directions. Transforms vague ideas into practical, tangible expressions through 5 rounds of parallel agent analysis and refinement.
description_zh: 一个使用并行子代理进行结构化头脑风暴的工具，通过5轮分析探索和优化想法。它通过系统应用不同的思维视角，将模糊概念转化为实际表达。
_original_description: A structured brainstorming tool that uses parallel sub-agents to explore and refine ideas through 5 rounds of analysis. It transforms vague concepts into practical expressions by applying different thinking perspectives systematically.

name: dev-work-summary
author: otrebu
description: Scan ~/dev recursively for git repos and report today's work with commits, branches, stats, and detailed change analysis. Use when user asks "what did I work on", "show my work", "daily summary", "what repos did I touch".

name: ai-sdk
author: outfitter-dev
description: This skill should be used when building AI features with Vercel AI SDK, using useChat, streamText, or generateObject, or when "AI SDK", "streaming chat", or "structured outputs" are mentioned.
description_zh: 该技能提供使用 Vercel AI SDK v6 构建AI应用的模式和最佳实践，包括流式聊天界面、结构化JSON输出和智能体工作流。

name: bun-dev
author: outfitter-dev
description: This skill should be used when working with Bun runtime, bun:sqlite, Bun.serve, bun:test, or when "Bun", "bun:test", or Bun-specific patterns are mentioned.
description_zh: 该技能为使用 Bun JavaScript 运行时进行开发提供指导，涵盖其原生 API，如 SQLite 数据库、HTTP 服务器、测试、文件操作和包管理。

name: cli-development-guidelines
author: outfitter-dev
description: This skill should be used when designing, implementing, or reviewing CLI tools, or when flags, subcommands, help text, exit codes, or `--cli-dev` are mentioned.
description_zh: 这是CLI开发指南的重定向通知。该技能已移至专门的cli-dev插件中，该插件包含参数解析、帮助文本、子命令和错误消息的模式。

name: code-review
author: outfitter-dev
description: This skill should be used when reviewing code before commit, conducting quality gates, or when "review", "fresh eyes", "pre-commit review", or "quality gate" are mentioned.
description_zh: 一个用于代码提交前质量检查的系统化代码审查技能，通过清单式分析检查类型安全、错误处理、安全性、测试和代码质量，在部署前发现问题。

name: hono-dev
author: outfitter-dev
description: This skill should be used when building APIs with Hono, using hc client, implementing OpenAPI, or when "Hono", "RPC", or "type-safe API" are mentioned.
description_zh: 用于使用 Hono 框架构建类型安全 API 的专门技能，涵盖路由链式调用、RPC 模式、基于 Zod 的 OpenAPI 文档生成以及端到端类型推断。

name: pathfinding
author: outfitter-dev
description: This skill should be used when requirements are unclear, brainstorming ideas, or when "pathfind", "brainstorm", "figure out", "clarify requirements", or "work through" are mentioned.
description_zh: 该技能通过结构化提问、信心度追踪和分阶段探索，帮助澄清模糊需求并集思广益，将模糊想法转化为可执行的路径。

name: react-dev
author: outfitter-dev
description: This skill should be used when building React components with TypeScript, typing hooks, handling events, or when React TypeScript, React 19, Server Components are mentioned. Covers type-safe patterns for React 18-19 including generic components, proper event typing, and TanStack Router integration.
description_zh: 用于使用 TypeScript 构建类型安全的 React 应用的技能，涵盖组件、钩子、事件处理，以及 React 19 新特性和 TanStack Router 的集成。

name: report-findings
author: outfitter-dev
description: This skill should be used when synthesizing multi-source research, presenting findings with attribution, or when "report", "findings", or "synthesis" are mentioned.
description_zh: 该技能用于综合多来源研究，评估可信度，交叉引用信息，并以结构化分析和正确引用的方式呈现研究结果。

name: typescript-dev
author: outfitter-dev
description: This skill should be used when writing TypeScript, eliminating any types, implementing Zod validation, or when strict type safety is needed. Covers modern TS 5.5+ features and runtime validation patterns.
description_zh: 一个用于编写健壮 TypeScript 代码的技能，专注于严格的类型安全、消除'any'类型、实现Zod验证以及使用现代TypeScript 5.5+功能，如可辨识联合和Result类型。

name: implementing-jsc-classes-zig
author: oven-sh
description: Creates JavaScript classes using Bun's Zig bindings generator (.classes.ts). Use when implementing new JS APIs in Zig with JSC integration.
description_zh: 提供使用Zig和Bun的JSC绑定生成器创建JavaScript类的模板。展示如何在.classes.ts文件中定义接口并在Zig中实现，涵盖构造函数、方法、属性缓存、错误处理和内存管理，用于JavaScript API开发。

name: writing-bundler-tests
author: oven-sh
description: Guides writing bundler tests using itBundled/expectBundled in test/bundler/. Use when creating or modifying bundler, transpiler, or code transformation tests.
description_zh: 提供使用Bun的itBundled/expectBundled框架编写打包器测试的详细指南。涵盖测试设置、文件组织、打包器选项、运行时验证和错误处理，包含具体代码示例。
_original_description: Provides detailed guidance for writing bundler tests using Bun's itBundled/expectBundled framework. Covers test setup, file organization, bundler options, runtime verification, and error handling with concrete code examples.

name: zig-system-calls
author: oven-sh
description: Guides using bun.sys for system calls and file I/O in Zig. Use when implementing file operations instead of std.fs or std.posix.
description_zh: 为Zig开发者提供基于bun.sys的跨平台系统调用接口，替代std.fs。提供更好的错误处理机制，包含Maybe(T)返回类型、自动EINTR重试以及详细的错误信息（errno、系统调用标签、文件描述符）。
_original_description: Provides Zig developers with a cross-platform system call interface using bun.sys as an alternative to std.fs. Offers better error handling with Maybe(T) return types, automatic EINTR retry, and detailed error information including errno, syscall tags, and file descriptors.

name: sindri-extension-guide
author: pacphi
description: Guide users through creating Sindri extensions. Use when creating new extensions, understanding extension.yaml structure, validating extensions against schemas, or learning about extension installation methods (mise, apt, binary, npm, script, hybrid). Includes NEW capabilities system for project-init, authentication (multi-method API key + CLI auth), lifecycle hooks, and MCP integration. Helps with extension development, registry updates, and category assignment.
_original_description: Guide users through creating Sindri extensions. Use when creating new extensions, understanding extension.yaml structure, validating extensions against schemas, or learning about extension installation methods (mise, apt, binary, npm, script, hybrid). Helps with extension development, registry updates, and category assignment.

name: ecpay
author: paid-tw
description: Provides ECPay (綠界科技) integration guide including payment setup and electronic invoice integration. Use when integrating ECPay payment gateway or e-invoice features.

name: newebpay
author: paid-tw
description: Provides NewebPay integration overview and guides users to the appropriate skill. Use when starting NewebPay integration, setting up environment, or needing general guidance about 藍新金流.

name: newebpay-checkout
author: paid-tw
description: Implements NewebPay MPG checkout integration including AES256 encryption, form submission, and payment callback handling. Use when integrating payment gateway, creating checkout flows, or building 藍新金流 payment pages.

name: newebpay-query
author: paid-tw
description: Implements NewebPay transaction query functionality using QueryTradeInfo API. Use when building order status checking, transaction verification, or payment confirmation features for 藍新金流.

name: newebpay-refund
author: paid-tw
description: Implements NewebPay refund functionality for credit cards and e-wallets. Use when building refund processing, transaction cancellation, or return payment features for 藍新金流.

name: payment-help
author: paid-tw
description: Analyzes user requirements and recommends the best Taiwan payment gateway. Provides comparison between NewebPay, ECPay, and PAYUNi based on specific needs. Use when choosing a payment solution or comparing 金流服務.

name: payuni
author: paid-tw
description: Provides PAYUNi integration overview and guides users to the appropriate skill. Use when starting PAYUNi integration, setting up environment, or needing general guidance about 統一金流.
_original_description: Provides PAYUNi (統一金流) integration guide including payment gateway setup and API configuration. Use when integrating PAYUNi payment services or unified payment solutions.

name: payuni-checkout
author: paid-tw
description: Implements PAYUNi UPP checkout integration including AES256 encryption, form submission, and payment callback handling. Use when integrating payment gateway, creating checkout flows, or building 統一金流 payment pages.

name: payuni-query
author: paid-tw
description: Implements PAYUNi transaction query functionality using Query API. Use when building order status checking, transaction verification, or payment confirmation features for 統一金流.

name: payuni-webhook
author: paid-tw
description: Implements PAYUNi webhook handling including signature verification, replay attack prevention, and payment status updates. Use when building payment notification endpoints for 統一金流.

description_zh: 基于抽象语法树的代码搜索和重构工具，使用ast-grep引擎。可查找函数调用、导入等语法模式，忽略字符串和注释。支持多种编程语言，包含安全预览模式防止误操作。
_original_description: Provides AST-based code search and refactoring using ast-grep. Finds syntax patterns like function calls and imports while ignoring strings/comments. Supports multiple languages and includes dry-run previews for safe refactoring.

description: Create git commits with user approval and no Claude attribution
description_zh: 一个Claude技能，用于创建需要用户确认的git提交。它会运行git状态和差异检查，分组相关更改，起草描述性提交信息，并为未来会话生成推理文件。明确避免在提交中包含Claude署名。
_original_description: A Claude skill that creates git commits with user approval, runs git status/diff, groups related changes, drafts descriptive messages, and generates reasoning files for future context. It explicitly avoids Claude attribution in commits.

name: compound-learnings
author: parcadei
description: Transform session learnings into permanent capabilities (skills, rules, agents). Use when asked to "improve setup", "learn from sessions", "compound learnings", or "what patterns should become skills".
description_zh: 该技能自动化地从Claude会话学习记录中提取模式，并将其转换为可复用的规则、技能、钩子或智能体更新。它提供了一个结构化的8步流程，包含频率阈值、工件类型决策逻辑和具体的文件创建模板。
_original_description: This skill automates the extraction of patterns from Claude session learnings and converts them into reusable artifacts like rules, skills, hooks, or agent updates. It provides a structured 8-step process with frequency thresholds, artifact type decision logic, and concrete file creation templates.

author: parcadei
description: Create or update continuity ledger for state preservation across clears
description_zh: 创建外部Markdown账本，在Claude的/clear命令后保存会话状态。提供结构化模板跟踪目标、决策和进度，让开发者在清理上下文后能恢复工作，不丢失关键信息。
_original_description: Creates external markdown ledgers to preserve session state across Claude's /clear command. Provides a structured template for tracking goals, decisions, and progress, enabling developers to resume work after clearing context without losing critical information.

name: debug
author: parcadei
description: Debug issues by investigating logs, database state, and git history
description_zh: 该技能帮助开发者通过检查日志、数据库状态和Git历史记录来调试问题，无需编辑文件。它在手动测试或实施阶段提供结构化调查步骤和并行任务执行，用于高效问题诊断。
_original_description: This skill helps developers debug issues by examining logs, database state, and git history without editing files. It provides structured investigation steps and parallel task execution for efficient problem diagnosis during manual testing or implementation phases.

name: debug-hooks
author: parcadei
description: Systematic hook debugging workflow. Use when hooks aren't firing, producing wrong output, or behaving unexpectedly.
description_zh: 为Claude Code钩子提供系统化的调试工作流程，包含具体的bash命令。涵盖常见故障场景如注册缺失、静默错误和构建问题。包含手动测试的实用示例和诊断检查清单。
_original_description: Provides a systematic debugging workflow for Claude Code hooks with concrete bash commands. Covers common failure scenarios like missing registrations, silent errors, and build issues. Includes practical examples for manual testing and a diagnostic checklist.

name: describe-pr
author: parcadei
description: Generate comprehensive PR descriptions following repository templates
description_zh: 通过读取仓库模板、分析代码变更和运行验证测试来自动生成PR描述。集成GitHub CLI获取PR数据和推理历史，然后直接更新PR描述。
_original_description: Automates PR description generation by reading repository templates, analyzing code changes, and running verification tests. Integrates with GitHub CLI to fetch PR data and reasoning history, then updates PR descriptions directly.

description_zh: 该技能通过Claude提供GitHub搜索API的命令行访问，允许开发者直接从终端搜索代码、仓库、问题和PR。它用清晰的参数选项和示例包装了GitHub的搜索功能。
_original_description: This skill provides command-line access to GitHub's search API through Claude, allowing developers to search code, repositories, issues, and PRs directly from their terminal. It wraps GitHub's search functionality with clear parameter options and examples.
